author: y4rr
content: Implemented via commit 1da12896. Extended CapturePool with Mutex<Vec<Box<dyn Any + Send + Sync>>> buffer tracking; record_buffer<B>(B) registers any 'static buffer for lifetime extension. CapturedGraph holds Option<Arc<CapturePool>>; end_capture_with_pool(stream, pool) attaches the pool so the graph keeps every registered buffer alive across replays. 6 unit tests + 5 integration tests on real RTX 3090, including a CUDA graph capture+replay with three buffers held alive by the pool and a strong-count test proving drop semantics work end-to-end. 232 ferrotorch-gpu lib tests pass.
